title: corispermum chinganicum var. stellipile
intro: Corispermum chinganicum var. stellipile is a type of plant that belongs to the Amaranthaceae family, commonly known as the desert-holly or Chinese saltwort. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation, relieve digestive issues, and act as an antiseptic. The health benefits of Corispermum chinganicum var. stellipile include reducing fever, alleviating cough and respiratory problems, and supporting kidney function. Corispermum chinganicum var. stellipile is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, with the dried roots and stems being used to make herbal tea or added to soups for medicinal purposes.
